name: Focaccia Bread W/Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the tomatoes and Parmesan cheese in the machine.
2. Program for Raisin Bread, Basic Bread, Basic Wheat, Basic, White, Basic White, or White/Whole Grain.
3. Press Start or On.
4. Add the tomatoes and cheese when the beeper sounds or during the last 5 minutes of the final knead cycle.
This recipe is suitable for the Large Oster, West Bend, Large Pillsbury, and Large Zo mixers.
